Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of The Entire Representative Action Without Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bryce Bomme
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Kenneth Durham's unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of The Entire Representative Action Without Prejudice is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of The Entire Representative Action Without Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Bryce Bommer
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to open court, both counselors appear. Parties state they are not contesting the Court's tentative ruling.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Kenneth Durham's unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of The Entire Representative Action Without Prejudice is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
